headline: Eye on the Market
supportingText: Explore Eye on the Market, timely commentary that offers views on the economy, markets, and investment portfolios by Michael Cembalest.

pages.title: Semiquincententacles
pages.description: Behold the Aquilaceph, half-bald eagle and half-octopus. On the semiquincentennial 250th anniversary of the US Declaration of Independence, this imaginary beast is a metaphor for the continued US grip on financial markets.

authors.title: Chairman of Market and Investment Strategy for J.P. Morgan Asset & Wealth Management
authors.name: Michael Cembalest

pages.title: Home Alone: inflation and the new Fed chair; investing in China's AI ecosystem; Prediction markets
pages.description: The new Fed chair Kevin Warsh, like Kevin McCallister in Home Alone, faces a lonely vigil: survive until the adults get home again. The latest on inflation, rising Treasury yields, shrinking equity risk premia & pressure from the White House.

authors.title: Chairman of Market and Investment strategy for J.P.Morgan Asset & Wealth Management
authors.name: Michael Cembalest

pages.title: Fighting Words: The Energy Transition in 2026
pages.description: This year we tackle the fiercest energy debates from data centers and power prices to the "primary energy" fallacy and more.
